info.title: 使用性能测试工作流对系统进行测试

parts.text: 使用性能测试工作流对系统进行测试

用户想要使用性能测试工作流对系统进行测试。我需要先查看可用的工作流，找到性能测试相关的工作流，然后使用它。

从 Available Workflows 中我看到有一个：
- `自动化性能测试工作流` - 三阶段性能测试，路径 `/home/flocks/.flocks/plugins/workflows/performance-test-workflow/workflow.json`，scope: global

我应该使用 `run_workflow` 工具来执行这个工作流。但首先我需要了解这个工作流需要什么输入参数。让我先读取工作流定义文件来了解其结构和需要的输入。

state.output:
<file>
00001| {
00002|   "id": "performance-test-workflow",
00003|   "name": "自动化性能测试工作流",
00004|   "description": "三阶段性能测试",
00005|   "start": "parse_inputs",
00006|   "nodes": [
00007|     {
00008|       "id": "parse_inputs",
00009|       "type": "python",
00010|       "description": "解析输入文件",
00011|       "code": "import os\nimport json\nworkspace = os.path.expanduser('~/.flocks/workspace/performance-test')\ninputs_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'inputs')\nos.makedirs(inputs_dir, exist_ok=True)\nos.makedirs(os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs'), exist_ok=True)\napi_list = ['/api/user/login', '/api/user/info', '/api/order/create', '/api/order/list', '/api/product/search']\nbusiness_scenarios = {'用户登录': '用户登录验证', '订单创建': '创建新订单'}\nperformance_requirements = {'target_tps': 100, 'response_time_ms': 200, 'concurrent_users': 50}\noutputs['api_list'] = api_list\noutputs['business_scenarios'] = business_scenarios\noutputs['performance_requirements'] = performance_requirements\noutputs['workspace'] = workspace\noutputs['use_mock_data'] = True"
00012|     },
00013|     {
00014|       "id": "analyze_source",
00015|       "type": "python",
00016|       "description": "分析源码",
00017|       "code": "import os\nworkspace = inputs.get('workspace')\nsource_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'inputs', 'source')\napi_endpoints = []\nif os.path.exists(source_dir):\n    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(source_dir):\n        for file in files:\n            if file.endswith('.java'):\n                api_endpoints.append({'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/' + file.replace('.java','').lower(), 'file': file})\nif not api_endpoints:\n    api_endpoints = [{'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/user/login', 'file': 'UserController.java'}, {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/user/info', 'file': 'UserController.java'}, {'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/order/create', 'file': 'OrderController.java'}, {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/order/list', 'file': 'OrderController.java'}, {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/product/search', 'file': 'ProductController.java'}]\n    outputs['use_mock_data'] = True\noutputs['api_endpoints'] = api_endpoints"
00018|     },
00019|     {
00020|       "id": "generate_jmx_script",
00021|       "type": "python",
00022|       "description": "生成JMeter脚本",
00023|       "code": "import os\nworkspace = inputs.get('workspace')\noutputs_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs', 'jmx_scripts')\nos.makedirs(outputs_dir, exist_ok=True)\njmx_path = os.path.join(outputs_dir, 'performance_test.jmx')\nwith open(jmx_path, 'w') as f:\n    f.write('<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?><jmeterTestPlan version=\"1.2\"><hashTree><TestPlan><stringProp name=\"TestPlan.comments\">Auto-generated</stringProp></TestPlan><hashTree><ThreadGroup><stringProp name=\"ThreadGroup.num_threads\">50</stringProp><stringProp name=\"ThreadGroup.ramp_time\">10</stringProp><boolProp name=\"ThreadGroup.scheduler\">true</boolProp><stringProp name=\"ThreadGroup.duration\">60</stringProp></ThreadGroup><hashTree><HTTPSamplerProxy testname=\"User Login\"><stringProp name=\"HTTPSampler.domain\">localhost</stringProp><stringProp name=\"HTTPSampler.port\">8080</stringProp><stringProp name=\"HTTPSampler.path\">/api/user/login</stringProp><stringProp name=\"HTTPSampler.method\">POST</stringProp></HTTPSamplerProxy></hashTree></hashTree></hashTree></jmeterTestPlan>')\noutputs['jmx_script_path'] = jmx_path"
00024|     },
00025|     {
00026|       "id": "generate_locust_script",
00027|       "type": "python",
00028|       "description": "生成Locust脚本",
00029|       "code": "import os\nworkspace = inputs.get('workspace')\noutputs_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs', 'locust_scripts')\nos.makedirs(outputs_dir, exist_ok=True)\nlocust_path = os.path.join(outputs_dir, 'locustfile.py')\nwith open(locust_path, 'w') as f:\n    f.write('from locust import HttpUser, task, between\\n\\nclass PerformanceUser(HttpUser):\\n    wait_time = between(1, 3)\\n    host = \"http://localhost:8080\"\\n\\n    @task(3)\\n    def user_login(self):\\n        self.client.post(\"/api/user/login\", json={\"username\": \"test\", \"password\": \"test123\"})\\n\\n    @task(2)\\n    def user_info(self):\\n        self.client.get(\"/api/user/info\")\\n\\n    @task(2)\\n    def order_create(self):\\n        self.client.post(\"/api/order/create\", json={\"product_id\": 1, \"quantity\": 1})\\n\\n    @task(1)\\n    def order_list(self):\\n        self.client.get(\"/api/order/list\")\\n\\n    @task(1)\\n    def product_search(self):\\n        self.client.get(\"/api/product/search?keyword=test\")')\noutputs['locust_script_path'] = locust_path"
00030|     },
00031|     {
00032|       "id": "execute_jmeter_test",
00033|       "type": "python",
00034|       "description": "执行JMeter测试",
00035|       "code": "import os\nimport datetime\nworkspace = inputs.get('workspace')\nresults_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs', 'test_results')\nos.makedirs(results_dir, exist_ok=True)\njmeter_results_path = os.path.join(results_dir, 'jmeter_results.jtl')\nwith open(jmeter_results_path, 'w') as f:\n    f.write('time,responseTime,success\\n' + str(int(datetime.datetime.now().timestamp())) + ',150,true\\n' + str(int(datetime.datetime.now().timestamp())) + ',180,true')\noutputs['jmeter_results_path'] = jmeter_results_path\noutputs['jmeter_summary'] = 'JMeter测试完成(模拟)'"
00036|     },
00037|     {
00038|       "id": "execute_locust_test",
00039|       "type": "python",
00040|       "description": "执行Locust测试",
00041|       "code": "import os\nimport csv\nworkspace = inputs.get('workspace')\nresults_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs', 'test_results')\nos.makedirs(results_dir, exist_ok=True)\nlocust_results_path = os.path.join(results_dir, 'locust_stats.csv')\nwith open(locust_results_path, 'w', newline='') as f:\n    writer = csv.writer(f)\n    writer.writerow(['Type', 'Name', 'Request Count', 'Failure Count', 'Median', 'Average'])\n    writer.writerow(['GET', '/api/user/login', 1000, 0, 75, 150])\n    writer.writerow(['POST', '/api/order/create', 500, 0, 85, 180])\noutputs['locust_results_path'] = locust_results_path\noutputs['locust_summary'] = 'Locust测试完成(模拟)'"
00042|     },
00043|     {
00044|       "id": "join_results",
00045|       "type": "python",
00046|       "join": true,
00047|       "description": "汇合测试结果",
00048|       "code": "outputs['jmeter_results_path'] = inputs.get('jmeter_results_path')\noutputs['locust_results_path'] = inputs.get('locust_results_path')\noutputs['jmeter_summary'] = inputs.get('jmeter_summary', '')\noutputs['locust_summary'] = inputs.get('locust_summary', '')\noutputs['performance_requirements'] = inputs.get('performance_requirements', {})\noutputs['api_endpoints'] = inputs.get('api_endpoints', [])\noutputs['workspace'] = inputs.get('workspace')"
00049|     },
00050|     {
00051|       "id": "analyze_jmeter_results",
00052|       "type": "python",
00053|       "description": "分析JMeter结果",
00054|       "code": "import os\noutputs['jmeter_analysis'] = '- 成功率: 100%\\n- 响应时间符合要求'\noutputs['bottlenecks_jmeter'] = []"
00055|     },
00056|     {
00057|       "id": "analyze_locust_results",
00058|       "type": "python",
00059|       "description": "分析Locust结果",
00060|       "code": "import os\noutputs['locust_analysis'] = '- /api/user/login: 1000 requests, 0 failures\\n- /api/order/create: 500 requests, 0 failures'\noutputs['bottlenecks_locust'] = []"
00061|     },
00062|     {
00063|       "id": "join_analysis",
00064|       "type": "python",
00065|       "join": true,
00066|       "description": "汇合分析结果",
00067|       "code": "outputs['jmeter_analysis'] = inputs.get('jmeter_analysis', '')\noutputs['locust_analysis'] = inputs.get('locust_analysis', '')\noutputs['bottlenecks_jmeter'] = inputs.get('bottlenecks_jmeter', [])\noutputs['bottlenecks_locust'] = inputs.get('bottlenecks_locust', [])\noutputs['performance_requirements'] = inputs.get('performance_requirements', {})\noutputs['api_endpoints'] = inputs.get('api_endpoints', [])\noutputs['workspace'] = inputs.get('workspace')"
00068|     },
00069|     {
00070|       "id": "generate_final_report",
00071|       "type": "python",
00072|       "description": "生成测试报告",
00073|       "code": "import os\nimport datetime\nworkspace = inputs.get('workspace')\noutputs_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs', 'reports')\nos.makedirs(outputs_dir, exist_ok=True)\ndate_str = datetime.date.today().isoformat()\nreport_content = '# 性能测试报告\\n\\n**测试时间**: ' + datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') + '\\n\\n## JMeter 结果\\n' + inputs.get('jmeter_analysis', '') + '\\n\\n## Locust 结果\\n' + inputs.get('locust_analysis', '') + '\\n\\n---\\n*由Flocks自动化性能测试工作流生成*\\n'\nreport_path = os.path.join(outputs_dir, 'performance_report_' + date_str + '.md')\nwith open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n    f.write(report_content)\noutputs['report_path'] = report_path\noutputs['report_summary'] = '报告已生成: ' + report_path"
00074|     }
00075|   ],

metadata.preview:
{
  "id": "performance-test-workflow",
  "name": "自动化性能测试工作流",
  "description": "三阶段性能测试",
  "start": "parse_inputs",
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "parse_inputs",
      "type": "python",
      "description": "解析输入文件",
      "code": "import os
import json
workspace = os.path.expanduser('~/.flocks/workspace/performance-test')
inputs_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'inputs')
os.makedirs(inputs_dir, exist_ok=True)
os.makedirs(os.path.join(workspace, 'outputs'), exist_ok=True)
api_list = ['/api/user/login', '/api/user/info', '/api/order/create', '/api/order/list', '/api/product/search']
business_scenarios = {'用户登录': '用户登录验证', '订单创建': '创建新订单'}
performance_requirements = {'target_tps': 100, 'response_time_ms': 200, 'concurrent_users': 50}
outputs['api_list'] = api_list
outputs['business_scenarios'] = business_scenarios
outputs['performance_requirements'] = performance_requirements
outputs['workspace'] = workspace
outputs['use_mock_data'] = True"
    },
    {
      "id": "analyze_source",
      "type": "python",
      "description": "分析源码",
      "code": "import os
workspace = inputs.get('workspace')
source_dir = os.path.join(workspace, 'inputs', 'source')
api_endpoints = []
if os.path.exists(source_dir):
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(source_dir):
        for file in files:
            if file.endswith('.java'):
                api_endpoints.append({'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/' + file.replace('.java','').lower(), 'file': file})
if not api_endpoints:
    api_endpoints = [{'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/user/login', 'file': 'UserController.java'}, {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/user/info', 'file': 'UserController.java'}, {'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/order/create', 'file': 'OrderController.java'}, {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/order/list', 'file': 'OrderController.java'}, {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/api/product/search', 'file': 'ProductController.java'}]
    outputs['use_mock_data'] = True
outputs['api_endpoints'] = api_endpoints"
    },
    {
      "id": "generate_jmx_script",

parts.text:
工作流已加载，这是一个三阶段性能测试工作流，包含 JMeter 和 Locust 两种测试方式。由于工作流中的测试脚本是模拟数据（use_mock_data=True），实际执行会是模拟测试。

让我执行这个工作流。
